SEARCH
Package com.example.eventlottery

Class EventFilterUtils

java.lang.Object
com.example.eventlottery.EventFilterUtils
public final class EventFilterUtils extends Object
Applies EventFilterCriteria to events, including optional distance from the user.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static double
    haversineKm(double lat1, double lon1, double lat2, double lon2)
    Computes the Haversine distance in kilometres between two WGS84 coordinate pairs.
    static boolean
    matchesForList(Event e, EventFilterCriteria c, Double userLat, Double userLng, boolean hasUserPosition)
    Returns whether an event satisfies the given criteria for the home list.
    static boolean
    matchesForMap(Event e, EventFilterCriteria c, Double userLat, Double userLng, boolean hasUserPosition)
    Returns whether an event satisfies the given criteria for the map view.
    static boolean
    passesEntrantPrivateListVisibility(Event e, Set<String> userWaitingListEventIds)
    Determines whether a private event should be visible to the entrant on the home list.
    static boolean
    showEventOnEntrantMap(Event e)
    Returns whether an event should appear as a map pin on the entrant map.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • passesEntrantPrivateListVisibility

      public static boolean passesEntrantPrivateListVisibility(Event e, Set<String> userWaitingListEventIds)
      Determines whether a private event should be visible to the entrant on the home list. Private events appear only if the user already has a waiting-list entry for that event.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to evaluate
      userWaitingListEventIds - set of event IDs the user has joined
      Returns:
      true if the event should be shown to this entrant

    • showEventOnEntrantMap

      public static boolean showEventOnEntrantMap(Event e)
      Returns whether an event should appear as a map pin on the entrant map. Private events are never shown as map pins.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to evaluate
      Returns:
      true if the event should be shown on the map

    • haversineKm

      public static double haversineKm(double lat1, double lon1, double lat2, double lon2)
      Computes the Haversine distance in kilometres between two WGS84 coordinate pairs.
      Parameters:
      lat1 - latitude of the first point in decimal degrees
      lon1 - longitude of the first point in decimal degrees
      lat2 - latitude of the second point in decimal degrees
      lon2 - longitude of the second point in decimal degrees
      Returns:
      distance in kilometres between the two points

    • matchesForList

      public static boolean matchesForList(Event e, EventFilterCriteria c, Double userLat, Double userLng, boolean hasUserPosition)
      Returns whether an event satisfies the given criteria for the home list. Distance is applied only when hasUserPosition is true and coordinates are available; otherwise the max-distance constraint is skipped.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to evaluate
      c - filter criteria to apply
      userLat - user's current latitude, or null if unknown
      userLng - user's current longitude, or null if unknown
      hasUserPosition - true if a GPS fix is available
      Returns:
      true if the event passes all active filter constraints

    • matchesForMap

      public static boolean matchesForMap(Event e, EventFilterCriteria c, Double userLat, Double userLng, boolean hasUserPosition)
      Returns whether an event satisfies the given criteria for the map view. Events without coordinates are always excluded. The registration-open filter is applied when isRegistrationOpenOnly() is true.
      Parameters:
      e - the event to evaluate
      c - filter criteria to apply, or null for no filtering beyond coordinates
      userLat - user's current latitude, or null if unknown
      userLng - user's current longitude, or null if unknown
      hasUserPosition - true if a GPS fix is available
      Returns:
      true if the event has coordinates and passes all active filter constraints
